creator: andrew-freebsd@areilly.bpc-users.org
text:
Crashes and dumps core.  Gdb says that stopped in
	aio_read:
	#0  0x0000000800d42b5c in aio_read () from /lib/libc.so.6

	Error message on stderr is:
	Bad system call: 12 (core dumped)

Fix: 

Don't know, sorry.
How-To-Repeat: 	Ran these lines:
	qemu-img create disk-c 4G
	qemu -m 256M -cdrom /dev/acd0 -boot d disk-c

	Disk in cdrom drive is (legitimate) Windows XP.

	tried with and without kquemu.ko

	tried with and without -windows2k-hack
